title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Syntel India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Syntel India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Syntel India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Bengaluru-based team.

About Syntel India:
Syntel India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Syntel India!
jsonLd.skills: JavaScript, REST APIs, Java, Machine Learning, Kubernetes, TypeScript, Agile/Scrum, React
